description.en: Withdraw your NFT from an auction before it ends. This cancels the auction and returns the NFT to you.
description.de: Ihr NFT vor Auktionsende abheben. Dies bricht die Auktion ab und gibt Ihnen das NFT zurück.
description.es: Withdraw your NFT from an auction before it ends. This cancels the auction and returns the NFT to you.
description.fr: Withdraw your NFT from an auction before it ends. This cancels the auction and returns the NFT to you.
description.ro: Withdraw your NFT from an auction before it ends. This cancels the auction and returns the NFT to you.
description.it: Withdraw your NFT from an auction before it ends. This cancels the auction and returns the NFT to you.

description.en: The ID of the auction to withdraw from.
description.de: Die ID der Auktion, aus der abgehoben werden soll.

description.fr: The ID of the auction to withdraw from.
